initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name,
    SUM(ss.ss_net_profit) AS store_sales_profit,
    SUM(sr.sr_net_loss) AS store_returns_loss,
    SUM(cs.cs_net_profit) AS catalog_sales_profit
FROM 
    store_sales ss
    JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
    LEFT JOIN store_returns sr 
        ON ss.ss_customer_sk = sr.sr_customer_sk 
        AND ss.ss_ticket_number = sr.sr_ticket_number 
        AND ss.ss_item_sk = sr.sr_item_sk
    LEFT JOIN catalog_sales cs 
        ON ss.ss_customer_sk = cs.cs_bill_customer_sk 
        AND ss.ss_item_sk = cs.cs_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d3 ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d1.d_moy = 4 
    AND d1.d_year = 2001
    AND d3.d_moy BETWEEN 4 AND 10
    AND d3.d_year = 2001
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id, 
    i_item_desc, 
    s_store_id, 
    s_store_name
ORDER BY 
    i_item_id ASC, 
    s_store_id ASC
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name,
    SUM(ss_net_profit) AS store_sales_profit,
    SUM(sr_net_loss) AS store_returns_loss,
    SUM(cs_net_profit) AS catalog_sales_profit
FROM store_sales
JOIN store_returns 
    ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = store_returns.sr_customer_sk
    AND store_sales.ss_ticket_number = store_returns.sr_ticket_number
    AND store_sales.ss_item_sk = store_returns.sr_item_sk
JOIN catalog_sales 
    ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk
    AND store_sales.ss_item_sk = catalog_sales.cs_item_sk
JOIN item 
    ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN store 
    ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 
    ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
    AND d1.d_moy = 4 
    AND d1.d_year = 2001
JOIN date_dim d2 
    ON store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    AND d2.d_moy BETWEEN 4 AND 10 
    AND d2.d_year = 2001
JOIN date_dim d3 
    ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
    AND d3.d_moy BETWEEN 4 AND 10 
    AND d3.d_year = 2001
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name
ORDER BY 
    i_item_id ASC,
    s_store_id ASC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name,
    SUM(ss.ss_net_profit) AS store_sales_profit,
    SUM(sr.sr_net_loss) AS store_returns_loss,
    SUM(cs.cs_net_profit) AS catalog_sales_profit
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
LEFT JOIN store_returns sr ON ss.ss_customer_sk = sr.sr_customer_sk
    AND ss.ss_ticket_number = sr.sr_ticket_number
    AND ss.ss_item_sk = sr.sr_item_sk
LEFT JOIN catalog_sales cs ON ss.ss_customer_sk = cs.cs_bill_customer_sk
    AND ss.ss_item_sk = cs.cs_item_sk
JOIN date_dim d3 ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
WHERE d1.d_moy = 4
  AND d1.d_year = 2001
  AND d3.d_moy BETWEEN 4 AND 10
  AND d3.d_year = 2001
GROUP BY i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_store_id, s_store_name
ORDER BY i_item_id ASC, s_store_id ASC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name,
    SUM(ss.ss_net_profit) AS store_sales_profit,
    SUM(sr.sr_net_loss) AS store_returns_loss,
    SUM(cs.cs_net_profit) AS catalog_sales_profit
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
LEFT JOIN store_returns sr 
    ON ss.ss_customer_sk = sr.sr_customer_sk 
    AND ss.ss_item_sk = sr.sr_item_sk 
    AND ss.ss_ticket_number = sr.sr_ticket_number
LEFT JOIN catalog_sales cs 
    ON ss.ss_customer_sk = cs.cs_bill_customer_sk 
    AND ss.ss_item_sk = cs.cs_item_sk
JOIN date_dim d3 ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
WHERE d1.d_moy = 4 
    AND d1.d_year = 2001
    AND d3.d_moy BETWEEN 4 AND 10
    AND d3.d_year = 2001
GROUP BY i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_store_id, s_store_name
ORDER BY i_item_id ASC, s_store_id ASC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name,
    SUM(ss_net_profit) AS store_sales_profit,
    SUM(sr_net_loss) AS store_returns_loss,
    SUM(cs_net_profit) AS catalog_sales_profit
FROM 
    store_sales,
    store_returns,
    catalog_sales,
    date_dim d1,
    date_dim d2,
    date_dim d3,
    store,
    item
WHERE 
    ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    AND ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    AND ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
    AND sr_item_sk = i_item_sk
    AND sr_customer_sk = ss_customer_sk
    AND sr_ticket_number = ss_ticket_number
    AND sr_item_sk = ss_item_sk
    AND cs_item_sk = i_item_sk
    AND cs_bill_customer_sk = ss_customer_sk
    AND cs_item_sk = ss_item_sk
    AND cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
    AND d1.d_moy = 4
    AND d1.d_year = 2001
    AND d3.d_moy BETWEEN 4 AND 10
    AND d3.d_year = 2001
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name
ORDER BY 
    i_item_id ASC,
    s_store_id ASC
LIMIT 100;

    i_item_id,

    s_store_id,

    SUM(ss.ss_net_profit) AS store_sales_profit,
    SUM(sr.sr_net_loss) AS store_returns_loss,
    SUM(cs.cs_net_profit) AS catalog_sales_profit
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
LEFT JOIN store_returns sr 
    ON ss.ss_customer_sk = sr.sr_customer_sk 
    AND ss.ss_item_sk = sr.sr_item_sk 
    AND ss.ss_ticket_number = sr.sr_ticket_number
LEFT JOIN catalog_sales cs 
    ON ss.ss_customer_sk = cs.cs_bill_customer_sk 
    AND ss.ss_item_sk = cs.cs_item_sk
JOIN date_dim d3 ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
